name: power-platform
description: Power Platform specialists (11 including power-platform-tester and power-bi-engineer) with Capability Grounding Protocol (extended with alternate-methods rule), maintainability-review skill, and strong ALM/git coverage for solutions, flows, and PBIP projects. House-opinions hook covers 8 mechanically-detectable §3/§4 violations. Knowledge bank captures production lessons (currently: programmatic-flow-creation via Dataverse Web API when the PA Management API is blocked, with flow-engineer, solution-alm-engineer, and power-platform-admin agents carrying inline priors). **First plugin to enable the marketplace-wide scenarios bank** (v0.10.0, 2026-05-21) — `plugins/power-platform/scenarios/` ships 3 seed scenarios from the ~136-cloud-flow customer DEV engagement (spn-flow-create-403, pa-management-api-roles-null, flow-clientdata-shape-drift), each schema-validated and consulted by flow-engineer/dataverse-architect/solution-alm-engineer with a mandatory unverified-scenario preamble. Bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for reading, writing, and DAX-evaluating Power BI .pbix/.pbit files without Power BI Desktop — requires `pip install pbix-mcp` on the consumer machine.
